original_image_tags: A faint vertical handwritten line is drawn along the left margin of the fourth paragraph.

elements.description: Typed U.S. Government Office Memorandum with subject 'FLYING SAUCERS', dated March 28, 1950. Includes printed routing slip with names and handwritten annotations, stamps labeled 'RECORDED - 61' and 'COPIES DESTROYED', and a file number '62-83894-212'.
